MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Sojourn Properties, Inc. is present. Represented by Karen Fout.
Attorney, David Brillant is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Darran Oliver is present and appearing with Limited Scope Attorney, Dmitri Pikman, Esq. .

The Judge Pro Tem Ann Hipsman, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of October 09, 2012 is vacated.
